channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI Obsession Is a Big Nothing Burger
item.description: Concerns about partners obsessed with AI will soon feel outdated.

item.title: Jeffries avoids discussing New Jersey Democratic candidate's ties to 1993 WTC bombing mastermind
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries declined to condemn Adam Hamawy despite being shown trial evidence.

item.title: Trump expresses support for Anti-Weaponization Fund but does not commit to reviving it
item.description: President Trump voiced support for the defunct $1.8 billion fund for alleged Biden administration targets.

item.title: Rolling Back Safetyism Requires Parents and Policymakers
item.description: How can young people become responsible adults if they are constantly sheltered?
